data.title: Coinbase’s Stock Rebounds After Hack and SEC Investigation News
data.description:
Despite facing a data breach affecting less than 1% of users and an SEC probe into its IPO user figures, Coinbase stock has surged over 10% today.
source: https://tokenist.com/coinbases-stock-rebounds-after-hack-and-sec-investigation-news/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=coinbases-stock-rebounds-after-hack-and-sec-investigation-news

data.title: Ethereum Co-founder: ETH is not a competitor to BTC, but its market value will eventually surpass Bitcoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Ethereum co-founder Anthony Di Iorio said at the 2025 Consensus Conference that Ethereum aims to be a substitute for Bitcoin, not a competitor. Di Iorio is one of the eight co-founders of the Ethereum blockchain, but he initially entered the cryptocurrency field by advocating Bitcoin, and believes that Ethereum may eventually surpass Bitcoin in market value. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Market News: Trump tax bill fails in House subcommittee
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news: Due to differences among the US Republicans on cost issues, Trump's tax bill failed to pass in the House of Representatives subcommittee. Hard-line US conservatives opposed the bill and sought further cuts to Medicaid. (Jinshi)

data.title: Trump's Tax Bill Faces Setback in House Subcommittee
data.description: According to BlockBeats, market reports indicate that U.S. President Donald Trump's tax bill has encountered a setback in the House subcommittee. The failure to pass the bill is attributed to disagreements within the Republican Party regarding cost issues.

data.title: Fifth Third bank eyes deeper crypto integration amid evolving U.S. regulations
data.description:
16-5-2025 – The venerable Fifth Third Bancorp is poised to deepen its involvement in the cryptocurrency sphere, according to Chief Strategy Officer Ben Hoffman. The Tennessee-based institution, which has cautiously dipped its toes into digital currency waters over the past half-decade, sees the evolving regulatory landscape as an opportune moment to accelerate its crypto endeavours. [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/fifth-third-bank-eyes-deeper-crypto-integration-amid-evolving-u-s-regulations/

data.title: A whale deposited 1.7 million USDC into Hyperliquid and opened a SOL short position with 20x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to OnChain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited 1.7 million USDC into Hyperliquid and opened a SOL short position with 20x leverage.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences Significant Liquidations
data.description: According to TechFlow, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market witnessed liquidations totaling $259 million over the past 24 hours. Of this amount, long positions accounted for $158 million, while short positions made up $101 million. A total of 96,739 traders were affected globally. The largest single liquidation occurred on a centralized exchange (CEX) involving an ETH-USDT swap valued at $4.1976 million.

data.title: AUSTRAC Slaps Cointree with $48K Fine for Late SMRs – Who’s Next?
data.description:
AUSTRAC has fined Melbourne-based crypto exchange Cointree A$75,120 for submitting suspicious matter reports late, saying the delay has hindered investigators tracing criminal funds. The case reflects Australia’s drive to shutter inactive exchanges and reinforce anti-money-laundering controls.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/austrac-fines-cointree-48k-late-smrs/

data.title: Bloomberg: US financial institution Fifth Third Bancorp plans to increase its crypto asset layout
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Fifth Third Bancorp., a financial institution headquartered in Nashville, Tennessee, began to establish partnerships with cryptocurrency companies about five years ago, but did not make major investments until the regulatory environment became clearer. According to its chief strategy officer Ben Hoffman, after establishing a small group of crypto customers who use the bank's deposit accounts and payment capabilities, the institution is considering how to further expand its crypto business. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Trump's "encryption committee" suffered a setback in its first vote in Congress, and its influence was questioned
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The "Crypto Committee" established by Trump failed to exert the expected influence in the first key vote in Congress, causing the ability of White House Crypto and AI Czar David Sacks and Digital Asset Advisory Committee Executive Director Bo Hines to be questioned. The committee aims to promote cryptocurrency-related legislation, but failed to make a breakthrough in the recent vote on the bill on stablecoin regulation. Analysts pointed out that the committee's low-key operation and lack of clear policy direction make it difficult to gain sufficient support within Congress. In addition, crypto projects involved in by Trump himself and his family, such as Trump Tokens and World Liberty Financial, have also raised concerns about ethics and conflicts of interest, further undermining the committee's credibility. Democratic lawmakers have expressed concern about these potential conflicts of interest, believing that this may affect the fairness of relevant legislation. At present, Trump's "Crypto Committee" faces the dual challenges of reshaping its image and enhancing its influence. (New York Post)
